commit.message:
ci: add GitHub Actions release workflow for cross-platform builds

Triggered on v* tag push. Builds standalone executables via PyInstaller:
- macOS: Excel Engine.app → ExcelEngine-macOS.zip
- Windows: ExcelEngine.exe → ExcelEngine-Windows.zip
- Linux: excel-engine-gui → ExcelEngine-Linux.tar.gz

All three artifacts are uploaded to a GitHub Release with auto-generated
release notes via softprops/action-gh-release.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: RabbitMQ-backed allocation processing with retry and DLQ (#10)

* Initial plan

* feat: replace Spring event processing with RabbitMQ for allocation retry

- Add spring-boot-starter-amqp and testcontainers:rabbitmq dependencies
- Add AllocationLockContentionException for SELECT FOR UPDATE contention
- Modify AllocationProcessor to throw AllocationLockContentionException on lock contention (instead of silently marking FAILED), enabling RabbitMQ retry
- Create RabbitMQConfig with allocation.queue (DLX-backed), allocation.dlq, allocation.dlx exchange, and stateless retry interceptor (3 attempts) + RepublishMessageRecoverer to DLQ
- Update AllocationEventHandler to publish allocation ID to RabbitMQ after transaction commit (instead of calling processor directly)
- Create AllocationMessageListener to consume from allocation.queue and call AllocationProcessor
- Remove AllocationProcessor dependency and direct processAllocation() call from AllocationService (processing is now fully async via queue)
- Update application.yml with RabbitMQ connection config
- Update AllocationControllerIntegrationTest to provision RabbitMQ via Testcontainers
- Update AllocationServiceTest to remove AllocationProcessor mock
- Update AllocationProcessorTest to assert exception on lock contention
- Add AllocationMessageListenerTest"

* fix: address PR review comments

- AllocationProcessor: throw AllocationLockContentionException on partial lock contention (lockedCandidates.size < candidateIds.size)
- Add AllocationProcessorTest: partial lock contention test case
- Refactor AllocationEventHandler into AllocationEventPublisher port (domain/port/out) + RabbitMQAllocationEventPublisher adapter (adapter/out/messaging); AllocationService now calls the port directly; remove AllocationEventHandler
- Rename adapter.in.messaging → adapter.messaging; move AllocationMessageListener
- Add k8s/rabbitmq-deployment.yaml, k8s/rabbitmq-service.yaml; update configmap, secret, deployment with RabbitMQ env vars and wait-for-rabbitmq init container with timeout
- Add AllocationRetryIntegrationTest verifying DLQ routing after 3 consecutive AllocationLockContentionExceptions
- Fix RabbitMQConfig retry policy to only retry AllocationLockContentionException (traverseCauses=true, defaultValue=false)"

commit.message:
fix: consolidate terminal win logic into _check_win via terminal parameter (#11)

* feat: add Circuit TTT (PDF variant) and fix classic TTT stale-cycle bug

Circuit TTT: new game mode where players apply X/H/CNOT gates to
individual cells and trigger a single measurement to collapse the board.
Adds backend models, Qiskit circuit builder, FastAPI router, TS types,
API client, hook, and full game page at /circuit-ttt.

Classic TTT fix: after a cycle collapses, moves whose both cells are
now classically owned are pruned from state.moves so the same cycle
cannot be re-detected on subsequent turns (stale-cycle bug).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: disable CellTile hover/tap after measurement or game over

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove over-restrictive hasPlayerMarker check and add deadlock detection

Two bugs caused the game to get stuck with no cells to place:

1. Frontend blocked selecting cells where the player already had a marker.
   That is not a quantum TTT rule — cells can hold multiple markers from
   different moves. Removed the hasPlayerMarker guard from selectCell.

2. Backend had no deadlock detection. After a collapse shrinks the free-cell
   pool, it was possible for the next player to have no valid 2-cell pair.
   Added _has_valid_move() and end the game as draw when that occurs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: force-collapse all remaining quantum states on deadlock instead of instant draw

When no valid move exists for the next player, collapse all remaining
entangled moves via Qiskit rather than immediately ending as draw.
After collapse, new free cells may open up, so the game continues for
whichever player still has valid moves. Only declare draw when both
players have exhausted all possible moves after collapse.

* Update backend/routers/circuit_ttt.py

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update frontend/src/pages/CircuitTTTPage.tsx

commit.message:
fix: centralize isHumanTurn in hook, use consistently in CircuitTTTPage (#10)

* feat: add Circuit TTT (PDF variant) and fix classic TTT stale-cycle bug

Circuit TTT: new game mode where players apply X/H/CNOT gates to
individual cells and trigger a single measurement to collapse the board.
Adds backend models, Qiskit circuit builder, FastAPI router, TS types,
API client, hook, and full game page at /circuit-ttt.

Classic TTT fix: after a cycle collapses, moves whose both cells are
now classically owned are pruned from state.moves so the same cycle
cannot be re-detected on subsequent turns (stale-cycle bug).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update backend/routers/circuit_ttt.py

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: disable CellTile hover/tap after measurement or game over

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove over-restrictive hasPlayerMarker check and add deadlock detection

Two bugs caused the game to get stuck with no cells to place:

1. Frontend blocked selecting cells where the player already had a marker.
   That is not a quantum TTT rule — cells can hold multiple markers from
   different moves. Removed the hasPlayerMarker guard from selectCell.

2. Backend had no deadlock detection. After a collapse shrinks the free-cell
   pool, it was possible for the next player to have no valid 2-cell pair.
   Added _has_valid_move() and end the game as draw when that occurs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: force-collapse all remaining quantum states on deadlock instead of instant draw

When no valid move exists for the next player, collapse all remaining
entangled moves via Qiskit rather than immediately ending as draw.
After collapse, new free cells may open up, so the game continues for
whichever player still has valid moves. Only declare draw when both
players have exhausted all possible moves after collapse.

* Update backend/routers/circuit_ttt.py

fix(docker): use RUN --mount instead of COPY --from

JuiceFS-backed BuildKit storage doesn't support hash computation
on cross-stage COPY. Use RUN --mount=type=bind to bypass checksum.
Also remove OpenSSL dependency (server uses rustls via reqwest).

commit.message:
ci: add coverage reporting, gosec, and Trivy scanning

- Upload coverage to Codecov on pull requests
- Run gosec static analysis for security issues
- Run Trivy filesystem scan for CRITICAL/HIGH vulnerabilities

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: implement virtual event enforcement via preToolUse hook

Emulate 4 custom hook events that Copilot CLI doesn't support:
- agentSwitch: validate role name (edit/create + bash), block invalid roles
- memoryWrite: namespace isolation, prevent cross-agent memory corruption
- taskCreate/StatusChange: JSON syntax validation for task-board.json
- chained command defense: per-segment analysis prevents whitelist bypass

Also fixes:
- Reviewer can now switch roles (virtual event bypasses file restriction)
- grep pipefail crash on no-match (added || true)
- Chained command bypass (echo > .agents/... && rm src/) now caught

Test results: 41/41 (5 suite + 15 false-positive + 21 virtual-event)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
:construction_worker: enable auto-merge on update-licenses PRs (#1114)

PRs created by the `update-licenses` workflow were not auto-merging
after CI passed, requiring manual intervention.

## Changes

- **`update-licenses.yml`**
  - Add `id: cpr` to `Create Pull Request` step to expose its outputs
- Add `Enable Auto Merge` step using
`peter-evans/enable-pull-request-automerge@v3`, triggered only on
`created` (skips on `updated`), squash merge strategy

```yaml
- name: Create Pull Request
  id: cpr
  uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@v8
  ...

- name: Enable Auto Merge
  if: steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-operation == 'created'
  uses: peter-evans/enable-pull-request-automerge@v3
  with:
    token: ${{ secrets.PAT }}
    pull-request-number: ${{ steps.cpr.outputs.pull-request-number }}
    merge-method: squash
```

> **Prerequisite:** Repository Settings → General → **Allow auto-merge**
must be enabled.

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: SorrowBlue <25735189+SorrowBlue@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: reconcile full Deployment spec instead of selected fields

Compare existing vs desired Spec before updating. Replace the entire
Spec on update to avoid missing fields like Strategy or
MinReadySeconds.

commit.message:
security: add trap cleanup for SFTP temp files

Register EXIT trap to remove temporary SSH key file and known_hosts
file on script exit. Prevents SSH private key material from being
left on disk in shared /tmp directory after failures.

fix(#144): instant scroll + near-bottom guard, fixes snap regression and TC5 (#146)

- Replace animateScrollToItem with instant scrollToItem to eliminate
  animation/gesture mutex conflict causing snap-back during streaming
- Add near-bottom guard (lastVisible >= size-2): if user has scrolled up
  to read history, new messages no longer yank them back to the bottom
  (the scroll-to-bottom button handles that use case)
- Fixes TC5: 'send message while scrolled up → should NOT auto-scroll'

- Handle get_player() returning None in input_source mode

commit.message:
fix: use Always ImagePullPolicy for server container

Align the Kopia server Deployment container with the operator's own
manager pod, which uses Always. Prevents stale cached images when
using tag-based references like :latest.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(baton): 实现指挥棒三脚本（launcher/collect/delegate）

- baton-launcher.sh: 通用 Agent 启动器，支持 claude/gemini/kimi/copilot
- baton-collect.sh: 结果收集与信号解析（DONE/BLOCKED/无信号/空文件四态）
- baton-delegate.sh: 高层包装，正确区分 timeout/error/blocked
- CONTRIBUTING.md 9: 补 rubber-duck 等待规则（高中低影响等级矩阵）

blocking 修复（rubber-duck 三轮确认）:
- kimi 固定用 --output-format text，不用 stream-json
- 无信号默认 exit 1（不假设成功）
- prompt > 512KB 硬拒绝，> 200KB 告警（ARG_MAX 防护）
- timeout 用 if/else 包装，正确传播 exit 124
- python3 解析用 heredoc + sys.argv[1]

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: redcap
repository.description: 一个AI编程的skill

commit.message:
タスク・ゴール取得用の PowerShell スクリプトを追加

GitHub Projects の GraphQL API を使って、タスクやゴールの一覧を
ステータス指定で取得できるヘルパースクリプトを作成。

- scripts/Get-Tasks.ps1: タスク一覧取得（-Status で絞り込み可）
- scripts/Get-Goals.ps1: ゴール一覧取得（-Status で絞り込み可）

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: bowling false matches + fielding catching[] key extraction

Bowling: require first-initial match for last-name resolution, preventing
false attributions (e.g., 'Mohit Sharma' bowling → 'Jitesh Sharma').
Single-word names still fall back to last-name-only matching.

Fielding: add 'catcher' key (CricAPI v1 uses {catcher: {id, name}})
and fix 'stumped' typo in key lookup.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix git checkout failure during rework: reset before branch switch

SyncWithMainAsync does git checkout main, which fails if the
workspace has uncommitted changes from a prior failed rework.
Adding git reset --hard HEAD before checkout ensures clean state.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.description: An agent based dev team of a PM, architect, principal engineer, research and senior and junior engineers.

commit.message:
security: add SecurityContext to server and backup pods

Add pod-level SecurityContext (runAsNonRoot, seccompProfile RuntimeDefault)
and container-level SecurityContext (allowPrivilegeEscalation=false,
readOnlyRootFilesystem=true, drop ALL capabilities) to both the Kopia
server Deployment pods and CronJob backup pods created by the operator.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: shaypal5 <917954+shaypal5@users.noreply.github.com>

Render story as markdown (#3)

* Improve story view with spinner and HTML→Markdown description

- Add Spinner utility for terminal loading animation during API calls
- Add HtmlConverter utility wrapping flexmark HTML→Markdown conversion
- Add flexmark-html2md-converter dependency to cli/pom.xml
- Render story description as Markdown instead of raw JSON output
- Format story header with ANSI bold via picocli Ansi.AUTO
- Refactor AgilityQuery.Builder: replace builder(String) with builder()
  and a fluent .from(String) method for a cleaner call-site API
- Remove from() convenience method from AgilityQueryClient interface
- Move HelpMixin to cli/mixins package

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Rebase from main

* Fix Spinner.close() to not throw InterruptedException

Cleanup code in try-with-resources should always complete. Catch
InterruptedException from thread.join() internally and re-set the
interrupt flag on the calling thread to preserve interrupt status.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add --json output option to story view

- Add JsonOutputMixin with --json flag supporting optional field selection
  via comma-separated values (e.g. --json Name,Number,Description)
- Refactor ViewStoryCommand to use mixin, remove Story record and
  @RegisterReflectionForBinding in favour of Map-based queries
- Refactor AgilityQuery.Builder: select() is now a setter, build() is
  the terminal method
- Add TypeReference<T> overload to AgilityQueryClient for type-safe
  deserialization of parameterized types (e.g. Map<String, Object>)
- Refactor DefaultAgilityQueryClient to share HTTP + parsing logic
  across both query overloads
- Update tests to cover both Class<T> and TypeReference<T> query paths

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix native crash, simplify --json option, add tests

- Fix FlexmarkHtmlConverter static initializer crash in native image
  by adding --initialize-at-build-time=com.vladsch.flexmark in both
  pom.xml (for local/test builds) and native-image.properties (for CI
  musl builds where -DbuildArgs replaces the pom.xml list entirely)

- Simplify --json option: replace sentinel string + preprocessor with
  arity="0..1", fallbackValue="", split="\s*,\s*"; fieldsOrElse()
  filters blank entries to handle double-comma input (e.g. field1,,field2)

- Render story view as Markdown via Mordant instead of raw Ansi codes;
  extract toMarkdown() as package-private static for testability;
  add null-safe stringField() accessor

- Add null/blank guard to HtmlConverter.convert()

- Add tests: JsonOutputMixinTests (6 cases) and ViewStoryCommandTests (2 cases)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
